signals.headline: US XRP ETFs Record $12M Net Inflows in April After March Outflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US XRP ETFs Record $12M Net Inflows in April After March Outflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
ETFs flipped to positive flows this month amid retail recovery post-63% drawdown, signaling renewed institutional demand and XRP's first green month since September 2025[2]. Global ETPs added $20M inflows, ranking XRP third in institutional interest behind Bitcoin and Solana[2].

signals.headline: XRPL Launches $550K Audit Contest on April 13 for Privacy Upgrades | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRPL Launches $550K Audit Contest on April 13 for Privacy Upgrades | YES | MED confidence**  
Ripple and Sherlock initiated the contest to secure RISC-V ZK verifier, Smart Escrows (Q2 2026), and Smart Vaults, enhancing programmable privacy and compliance on the ledger[2]. This builds on XRPL Commons collaboration for native privacy features[2].
